value: fresh_perm_only and fresh_perm_plus_sandwich_plus_pad both rely on the same per-call fresh N_in / perm / N_out sampling in run_swiglu_mlp_island; the two bundles therefore produce identical numerical traces under this wrapper. The bundle label distinguishes the security posture (default-on candidate vs. not), not the numerical visibility surface.
